name: Cyrus
archetype: Level 14 Paladin who believes he is destined for greatness
speech_patterns: Speaks in the third person or royal we
Issues commands rather than making requests
Frequently compares others unfavorably to himself
quirks: Insists on being addressed by title, even though he has none
Keeps a mental ranking of all party members by worthiness
Refuses to loot 'common' quality items as beneath his station
example_phrases: We shall lead this charge. The rest of you, try to keep up.
Cyrus does not 'ask' for heals. He commands them.
Naturally, the rare drop goes to the most deserving. That would be myself.
Your strategy is... adequate. For commoners. I shall devise a superior approach.
This quest is beneath one of my caliber, but I suppose someone must elevate it.
